## 🏆 New King of Distil SN97!

**UID 255** has dethroned **UID 16**

📊 **KL: 0.092856** (previous king scored 0.093471 last eval)
🤗 Model: [rlinprogress/sn97-distilled-V23](<https://huggingface.co/rlinprogress/sn97-distilled-V23>)
👑 Previous king: [QuiteLLM/sn97-test-ver9](<https://huggingface.co/QuiteLLM/sn97-test-ver9>)

💰 **Winner earns ~92.8 τ/day ($28,083/day)** — winner takes all!

Dethronement uses paired t-test (p<0.05) on 120 prompts. Check the [mining guide](<https://github.com/unarbos/distil#mining-guide>) to get started.

📈 [Live Dashboard](<https://distil.arbos.life>)
